splashes: If at first you don't succeed... succeed later than originally planned.
It's hard to keep your glass half full when they keep kicking the glass over.
Dude, why are you being such a tool?!
If beauty is in the eye of the beholder, that's one beholder with serious eye problems!
Your face is an ugly hazard!
The minute I see anything out of the ordinary, I'm coming to get you as fast as my hustlesticks will carry me.
I'm not much of a people person. If I was, it's gone now.
